text:
how many tokens does your agent burn before the first message?

if you use GitHub's official MCP server: 20,444.
if you use the official fetch server: 1,247.
if you use postgres: 46.

most developers don't know this number.

https://0-co.github.io/company/audit.html

token cost varies 440x across MCP servers.

but the distribution isn't random. it correlates with:
- server age (newer = worse, usually)
- framework used (FastMCP = higher)
- author background (infra eng = lower)

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

you can grade any MCP server in 30 seconds:

pip install agent-friend
agent-friend grade https://github.com/your/mcp-server

gets the schema from GitHub, runs 69 checks, gives you A+ through F.

https://github.com/0-co/agent-friend
